---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the platform or the Commons
title: "[idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The problem**
What rider need or gap does this address?

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see.

**Alternatives considered**
Anything else you weighed.

**Scope check**
Does this belong to the open Commons (the map/data) or to an app built on top of it?
